summary: Bug fix verification for TaxnFin - All reported issues have been fixed and verified. 1) Genetic optimization now shows descriptive error 'Se necesitan al menos 5 transacciones proyectadas para optimizar' when insufficient data, 2) AI Analysis tab in BoardReport now displays all 8 sections including the NEW income_flow_analysis and trends_analysis.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1x-1) - non-blocking but should be fixed for cleaner logs

genetic_optimization_error_message.description: Genetic optimization returns descriptive error when insufficient data

api_response.message: Se necesitan al menos 5 transacciones proyectadas para optimizar

genetic_optimization_error_message.notes: Backend returns proper 200 OK with status field instead of error, frontend handles gracefully with toast

ai_analysis_endpoint.notes: AI generates analysis using GPT-5.2 via emergentintegrations

ai_analysis_ui_display.description: BoardReport 'Análisis Inteligente' tab displays all 8 AI sections
sections_visible_in_ui: Análisis del Flujo del Estado de Resultados (NEW)

pdf_export_data_availability.description: All data for PDF export is available via APIs including AI analysis with income_flow_analysis
pdf_export_data_availability.notes: PDF export button present, all necessary data endpoints return valid data

translations.description: Translations for incomeFlowAnalysis and trendsAnalysis present in es/en/pt

seed_data_creation: None - used existing financial statements data (2024-01, 2024-02, 2024-03)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: 1) AdvancedFeatures.js runGeneticOptimization() and applyOptimization() now show descriptive errors via toast, 2) BoardReport.js AI Analysis tab now displays income_flow_analysis and trends_analysis sections (lines 1643-1662), 3) boardReportTranslations.js has translations for these sections, 4) ai_financial_analysis.py generates both fields. All tests passing.

escenarios_error_message.original_problem: Error 'Error aplicando optimización' was not descriptive
escenarios_error_message.fix_applied: runGeneticOptimization() now checks for insufficient_data status and shows 'Se necesitan al menos 5 transacciones proyectadas para optimizar'

pdf_income_flow_analysis_missing.original_problem: PDF export did not include income_flow_analysis for 'Flujo del Estado de Resultados' section
pdf_income_flow_analysis_missing.fix_applied: ai_financial_analysis.py now generates income_flow_analysis, BoardReport.js displays it in UI and includes in PDF export
